About the Resort

A Signature
Island Experience

Blue Crystal Beach Resort sits above the shimmering waters of Palangan Bay, offering a refined escape where hand-carved Nara wood furnishings, marble floors, and open-air terraces frame every breathtaking view.

Whether you're seeking a romantic retreat, a family holiday, or a peaceful solo escape — our 15 air-conditioned ocean-facing suites and warm Filipino hospitality ensure every moment is unforgettable.

All rooms face the ocean
Private Wifi per room
Daily housekeeping
Free parking on-site
In-room dining available
Family-friendly pool
Accommodations

Our Rooms & Suites

Check availability →
1 / 7
01
King Suites

Second floor of the Kadena de Amor Building. Spacious balcony with stunning sea views, hand-carved Narra double bed, bath and shower, minibar, and ceiling fan.

From ₱4,800 / night
1 / 4
02
Executive Suite

Second floor of the Harmony Building. Premium suite with elegant furnishings, air-conditioning, minibar, cable TV, and free WiFi throughout your stay.

From ₱4,200 / night
1 / 8
03
Queen Room

Directly at the seafront on the first floor of the Harmony Building. Private veranda with garden and sea views, Narra double bed, and full bathroom.

From ₱3,200 / night
1 / 7
04
Deluxe Double Room

Garden Building with a private veranda overlooking tropical garden and sea. Hand-carved Narra bed, full bathroom with bath and shower, minibar, and cable TV.

From ₱2,800 / night
1 / 5
05
Superior Double Room

Garden and Harmony Buildings, second floor. Private veranda or balcony with unobstructed garden and sea views. Narra double or twin bed, minibar, and free WiFi.

From ₱3,000 / night
1 / 8
06
Executive Family Suites

First floor of the Kadena de Amor Building. Spacious family suite with veranda, multiple beds for up to 7 guests, full bathroom, air-conditioning, and minibar.

From ₱5,500 / night
1 / 5
07
Family Room Seaview

First floor of the Harmony Building. Two Narra Queen beds plus single, private veranda with garden and side sea views. Fits up to 5 guests comfortably.

From ₱4,100 / night
1 / 5
08
Deluxe Family Room

Ground floor of the Harmony Building. Garden-facing veranda, accommodates 4 guests. Air-conditioning, ceiling fan, cable TV, well-stocked minibar, and security box.

From ₱3,800 / night
What We Offer

Resort Amenities

Swimming Pool

Family-friendly pool open year-round, surrounded by tropical gardens and a bar.

Spa & Wellness

Rejuvenating massages and manicure/pedicure treatments to help you fully unwind.

Tropical Garden

Lush private gardens with hammocks, winding paths, and breathtaking sea-facing terraces.

Private Wifi

A dedicated wifi router in every room — seamless connectivity throughout your stay.

Free Parking

Secure, complimentary on-site parking for all guests arriving by vehicle.

Bar / Restaurant

Sip tropical cocktails or dine at our rooftop restaurant as the sun sets over Palangan Bay.

In-Room Dining

Full menu served in your room, in the garden, or on the beach at no extra charge.

Beach Access

Steps from the shores of Palangan Bay — your private slice of the Philippine coast.

Rooftop views of Palangan Cove

Third floor · Blue Crystal Harmony Building
Culinary Experience

Rooftop
Restaurant

Dine above the world at our rooftop restaurant, where sweeping views of the tropical garden and Palangan cove frame every meal. Our kitchen serves a wide range of Filipino and international dishes at refreshingly reasonable prices.

Filipino ClassicsLocal Favorites
Sinigang & AdoboTraditional
International DishesWorld Kitchen
Fresh SeafoodOcean-to-Table
Breakfast BuffetMorning Ritual

A Slice of Paradise

Pristine shores, clear tropical waters, and the warm hospitality of the Philippines — all waiting for you at Palangan Bay.

Getting Here

Palangan Bay,
Puerto Galera

A short jeepney ride from Puerto Galera's bustling center, our resort offers seclusion without isolation — the best of both worlds on Mindoro island.

~2h
From Manila by ferry
10 min
From Puerto Galera center
15+
Ocean-view rooms
★ 4.5
